assertions.title: Submit natural language query and receive response
assertions.reason: Query submission works, but AI backend is not configured (missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY), so no assistant response can be produced.

steps.action: Open AI panel and submit: 'How many employees are in Engineering?'
steps.expected: Query accepted, loading indicator appears, then AI response is returned.
steps.observed: Query submitted; request returned 503 with 'AI is not configured' message instead of an answer.

assertions.issues: Prerequisite failure: AI service is not configured in server environment.

assertions.title: AI responses stream incrementally
assertions.reason: Streaming behavior cannot be validated because all AI requests terminate early with missing_api_key (HTTP 503).

steps.action: Submit a long-form query to observe incremental chunking.
steps.expected: Assistant response text grows over time via streamed chunks.
steps.observed: No streamed assistant content; immediate user-friendly configuration error shown.

assertions.issues: Blocked by missing ANTHROPIC_API_KEY before SSE stream starts.

assertions.title: Team merge preview query
assertions.reason: Unable to validate AI merge analysis because backend returns missing_api_key for every query.

steps.action: Submit: 'What happens if we merge Platform and Infrastructure teams?'
steps.expected: AI references real team names/employees and describes merge impact.
steps.observed: AI request failed with configuration error; no analytical response returned.

assertions.issues: AI model call is gated by missing API key configuration.

assertions.title: Cost impact calculation query
assertions.reason: Could not validate numerical cost output because AI endpoint is unavailable due to missing key configuration.

steps.action: Submit: 'What's the cost impact of promoting all Senior Engineers to Staff?'
steps.expected: AI returns current/projected totals and delta using scenario salary data.
steps.observed: Request failed with 'AI is not configured' error; no calculation returned.

assertions.issues: AI endpoint unavailable until ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is configured.

assertions.title: AI is context-aware with real org data
assertions.reason: Context-awareness could not be evaluated because AI generation is blocked by missing_api_key.

steps.expected: AI returns direct reports matching org hierarchy.
steps.observed: No answer generated; configuration error shown instead.

assertions.issues: Blocked by AI backend configuration prerequisite.

assertions.title: Error handling for API key issues
assertions.reason: Missing-key path is verified, but invalid-key and rate-limit paths cannot be exercised while server is hard-failing preflight with missing_api_key.

steps.action: Submit AI query with current environment configuration.
steps.expected: User-friendly missing-key message (no stack trace) when key absent.
steps.observed: Displayed user-friendly 'AI is not configured' message with setup instructions.

steps.action: Attempt to validate invalid-key and rate-limit responses.
steps.observed: Not reachable in this environment because all requests are short-circuited at missing_key precheck.

assertions.issues: Only the missing-key branch could be validated in current shared environment.

assertions.title: AI handles non-existent employee gracefully
assertions.reason: Cannot validate non-existent employee handling without a successful AI response path.

steps.action: Submit: 'Tell me about John Nonexistent in this org.'
steps.expected: AI indicates employee not found and avoids fabricated data.
steps.observed: Request failed before model execution with missing_api_key configuration error.

assertions.title: AI chat preserves conversation context
assertions.reason: Multi-turn context behavior cannot be assessed because both turns fail at missing_key precheck.

steps.action: Ask: 'How many employees are in Engineering?' then follow with 'What about Sales?'
steps.expected: Follow-up interpreted in headcount context from prior turn.
steps.observed: Both requests returned missing-key configuration error; no context-bearing assistant responses were produced.

assertions.issues: Blocked by AI endpoint configuration prerequisite.

assertions.title: AI query reflects latest org data and selected scenario
assertions.reason: Data setup and scenario switching succeeded, but AI verification steps are blocked by missing_api_key responses in both scenarios.

steps.action: Add employee 'Jane Test' to Scenario A in Org Chart.
steps.observed: Jane Test was created and rendered in Org Chart (headcount increased).

steps.action: In Scenario A, ask AI about recent additions.
steps.observed: AI query returned missing-key configuration error (503).

steps.action: Switch to Scenario B and ask AI for scenario headcount.
steps.expected: AI answer reflects Scenario B data, not Scenario A.
steps.observed: Scenario switch succeeded (2 employees visible), but AI query again returned missing-key configuration error (503).

assertions.issues: Cross-scenario AI validation blocked by global AI configuration prerequisite.

frictions.description: When Add Employee panel and AI panel were both open, the Create Employee button click was blocked by overlapping panel layers.
frictions.resolution: Closed AI panel, then submitted employee form successfully.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` returned no captured entries for these flows.
frictions.resolution: Added temporary in-session fetch instrumentation via `agent-browser eval` and persisted request statuses to evidence file.

blockers.description: AI backend is not configured in this environment. Every AI query returned HTTP 503 with code `missing_api_key` and setup instructions to configure ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried queries across multiple prompts and both scenarios; all requests remained 503 with missing_api_key.

blockers.description: VAL-AI-007 requires invalid-key and rate-limit branches in addition to missing-key; these branches are unreachable while server precheck fails for missing key.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Validated missing-key UX branch; attempted additional queries but could not bypass precheck without changing shared server environment.

summary: Tested 9 assertions. 0 passed, 0 failed, 9 blocked due AI backend missing-key configuration prerequisite (with data setup and cross-scenario switching otherwise verified).
